nasb.text: Moreover, they shall teach My people the difference between the holy and the profane, and cause them to discern between the unclean and the clean.

esv.text: They shall teach my people the difference between the holy and the common, and show them how to distinguish between the unclean and the clean.

cnv.text: 他們要教導我的子民分別聖俗，使他們分辨潔淨的和不潔淨的。

ccb.text: 他们要教导我的子民辨别圣与俗，洁净与不洁净。
